memberdef.name: hpd_con

briefdescription.para: This function is called when a Hot-Plug-Detect (HPD) event is received by the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDpTxSs instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetCallback driver function to set this function as the handler for HPD event.

detaileddescription.para:
timeout_ms
received character

to resolution table

memberdef.name: i2c_write_dp141

briefdescription.para: This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

detaileddescription.para: Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

None.
None.
None. Application needs to know if it changed and need to detect new parameter. Based on the parameter, re-set and re-start VDAM and Tx
None This function will detect video resolution/frequency change Many GPUs won't re-train when only video res/freq change.

memberdef.name: IDT_8T49N24x_SetClock

briefdescription.para: This function calculates and sets the IDT 8TN49N24x device with the given clock configuration.

parameterdescription.para: is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.
specifies the input frequency.
specifies the output frequency.

specifies if the operation mode is locked/synthesizer mode.
TRUE Synthesizer mode (Fout only)
FALSE Locked mode (Fout locked to Fin)

listitem.para: XST_FAILURE I2C write error or incorrect parameters detected.

briefdescription.para: This function initializes the IDT 8TN49N24x with default values for use with the Video FMC.

detaileddescription.para: This function set the GPIO outputs.

I2CBaseAddress
is the baseaddress of the I2C core.
I2CSlaveAddress
is the 7-bit I2C slave address.

XST_FAILURE I2C write error.

memberdef.argsstring: (void *InstancePtr, u16 offset, XDpTxSs_MainStreamAttributes Msa[4], u8 stream)
memberdef.name: Dppt_DetectResolution

briefdescription.para: This function sets up the interrupt system so interrupts can occur for the DisplayPort TX Subsystem core.

detaileddescription.para: The function is application-specific since the actual system may or may not have an interrupt controller. The DPTX Subsystem core could be directly connected to a processor without an interrupt controller. The user should modify this function to fit the application.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if interrupt setup was successful.
A specific error code defined in "xstatus.h" if an error occurs.

briefdescription.para: This function configures Video Phy.

listitem.para: XST_SUCCESS if Video Phy configured successfully.

briefdescription.para: This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.

detaileddescription.para:
pointer
to timer
MicroSeconds
to wait
None.
None. This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.
It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

InstancePtr
is a pointer to the XDp instance.
None.
Use the XDpTxSs_SetUserTimerHandler driver function to set this function as the handler custom delay/sleep.
pointer
to timer
MicroSeconds
to wait
None.
None. This function use h/w timer to count specific Microseconds.
It provides timer with predefined amount of loop iterations.

parameterdescription.para: is a pointer to the XDp instance.

simplesect.para: Use the XDpTxSs_SetUserTimerHandler driver function to set this function as the handler custom delay/sleep.

parameterdescription.para: 1st block
2nd block
